underlying_goal: The user wanted Claude to serve as a comprehensive work assistant: preparing 1:1 meeting notes, creating product review updates, planning and implementing an engineering onboarding initiative, maintaining a brag document, coaching on salary negotiation messaging, and configuring tooling.
friction_detail: Claude initially included two weeks of data in the product review when the user only wanted one week; Linear MCP failed to update an issue description requiring clipboard fallback.
brief_summary: User ran a wide-ranging work session covering 1:1 prep, product reviews, onboarding initiative planning, brag doc maintenance, salary negotiation coaching, and MCP setup — Claude delivered effectively across all of them with minimal friction.
